name: ReCord

environmentVariables.RECORD_USER_DATA_DIR: Absolute path for ReCord data directory
environmentVariables.RECORD_USER_PLUGINS_DIR: Absolute path for custom plugin source folder
environmentVariables.VENCORD_USER_DATA_DIR: Legacy fallback env var still supported

notes: Do not rename internal Vencord module aliases unless you update the build pipeline.
ReCord branding is applied to user-facing names, logs, and setup files.
